summary: Sen. Johnson writes to Becerra and HRSA Administrator Carole Johnson regarding Countermeasures Injury Compensation Program claims by individuals for COVID-19 vaccine injuries.
body: Sen. Johnson sends a letter to HHS Secretary Xavier Becerra and Carole Johnson, Administrator of the Health Resources and Services Administration, regarding Countermeasures Injury Compensation Program claims by individuals for COVID-19 vaccine injuries.[^fn-280]
